channel.title: Cocoa on Everything is Gray
channel.description: Recent content in Cocoa on Everything is Gray

item.title: AutoPkgr - A Front End for AutoPkg
item.description: Recently, a couple coworkers of mine and I released AutoPkgr, a GUI front end for AutoPkg. AutoPkg is an extremely powerful command-line tool that allows IT administrators to automate OS X software packaging and distribution. AutoPkgr extends this functionality by adding the following key features: Easy tracking of which specific AutoPkg recipes you care about. Automatic scheduled checks for new downloads that are available as part of the AutoPkg recipes you subscribe to.
